What We Offer

Complete HR Support Under One Roof

From payroll processing to compliance advisory — we cover every aspect of your HR operations.

HR Outsourcing

We manage essential HR functions so business owners can focus on growth.

Learn more

Payroll Management

Accurate payroll processing with compliance to statutory requirements.

Learn more

Virtual HR Assistant

On-demand HR support for employee queries, policies, and HR administration.

Learn more

HR Compliance Support

Guidance on labour law compliance, disciplinary processes, and documentation.

Learn more

HR Policy Development

Creation of employee handbooks, company policies, and HR procedures.

Learn more

Training & Development

Workshops design & coordination to improve employee productivity and workplace culture.

Learn more
View All Services
How It Works

Simple Process. Real Results.

Our proven 4-step framework delivers structured HR transformation for your business.

01

Understand

We analyze your company's HR challenges, workforce structure, and compliance requirements.

02

Design

We create HR systems, policies, and processes suited to your organization.

03

Implement

We implement the HR framework and support your team in adopting the new processes.

04

Support

Continuous HR advisory support to ensure smooth operations and compliance.

Who We Serve

Built for Growing Businesses

PeoHR Solutions is purpose-built to support organizations that need professional HR management without the overhead of a full internal HR department.

About Our Approach

Small & Medium Enterprises

Structured HR support tailored to SME scale and budget.

Startups & Growing Companies

Build your HR foundation right from the beginning.

Companies Without HR Teams

Get professional HR management without hiring a full team.

Businesses Needing HR Systems

Transform ad-hoc HR practices into structured, compliant systems.
